---
title: "Problem Set 2"
subtitle: Due Friday September 19 at 5PM
editor: 
  mode: source
---

::: callout-important
## Under construction!
This assignment is not finalized. 
:::

## Problem 0

{{< include bank/_music-rec.qmd >}}

## Problem X

{{< include bank/independent-complements.qmd >}}

## Submission

{{< include bank/_submission.qmd >}}
